base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of hud_fruit_progression_counter — a ui from 1980 pac man. Bottom-right corner stack of last 8 fruit-bonuses earned (cherry. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Bottom-right corner stack of last 8 fruit-bonuses earned (cherry → strawberry → orange → apple → melon → galaxian → bell → key); placed 16 px from right edge; fills left-to-right as levels advance
